title: Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring
use_when: Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring. Use when the user needs a product workflow for technical related to engineering problem solving and solution structuring. Trigger terms: engineering, problem-solving, solution-design, tradeoff-analysis, technical.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring when the request is mainly market strategy, research synthesis, finance modeling, or executive communication; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring AI-builder handoff with implementation scope, verification plan, and risks
framework_fit: Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring fits AI Execution work in the Build With AI lifecycle when the user needs Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring AI-builder handoff with implementation scope, verification plan, and risks and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring AI-builder handoff with implementation scope, verification plan, and risks without tying recommendations to the user's Build With AI stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring as generic AI Execution advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $engineering-problem-solving-and-solution-structuring to turn this engineering context into a decision-ready Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring AI-builder handoff with implementation scope, verification plan, and risks.
examples.expected_artifact: Engineering Problem Solving and Solution Structuring AI-builder handoff with implementation scope, verification plan, and risks
